title: How can I create weekly report with late tasks and tasks due this week of all team members?

posts.author: VeronikaKunova (Veronika Kunova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I would like to create a weekly report that will be sent to Outlook e-mail and will contain: uncompleted/late tasks and tasks to be completed this week.

I need the report to have a structure like “My Work” (“past dates”, “this week”), but for each team member, i.e. the team member’s name, his/her “past dates” and “this week” items, under it another team member in the same structure, etc.

Is something like this even possible in Monday?

Thank you very much for your help!

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any update or answerer for this? @VeronikaKunova? Thank you

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @VeronikaKunova & @Chenry

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that provides reporting capabilities which are based on actual reports (static docs) and not dashboards. It allows to solve this exact case. Here’s an example →

Tasks that are upcoming this week (or any other period) by person →

Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 18.14.202172×450 40.1 KB

Tasks that are overdue (and not done) by person →

Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 18.17.141944×434 26.5 KB

These reports are sent via monday.com notification & email and can also solves a bunch of other cases but I’ll let you find those out
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000291

Hope that helps!

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you very much! I am going to test these!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @Chenry glad to hear that! If you need further assistance I’m available at daniel@fantasymedia.io

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Fantasy-Media-Team ,
If i get it correctly this solution provides reports only for one board, not multiple ones?
Thanks

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I use an app called Screenful Analysis and Reports and you can do this exactly. You can customize the reports and add information from multiple boards. It has its limitations but for us is the best solution to this problem at the moment. Hope it helps!
